forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 30 to 45 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 35 to 50 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 2:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 5 [Moderate]

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon and evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Mostly clear. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:20am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the eastern border in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h turning south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 2:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h becoming southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Mostly clear. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
No Rating
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Hawker, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Hawker. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 22.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower east of Ceduna, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, slight chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:40am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning southerly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. Light winds becoming southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 22.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then shifting south to southeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning southerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning then turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 3:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 6 [High]

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeast to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 27.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:30am to 3:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeast to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Mostly sunny. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.
Mostly clear. Winds northwest to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Mostly sunny. Winds south to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:10am to 3:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 7 [High]

Mostly sunny. The chance of raised dust north of Oodnadatta in the morning and afternoon. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 26.
Sunny. Winds southerly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.
Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 25.
